CustomField.description: Cap on Maintenance Reserve for This Assembly: Specify the maximum limit to be accumulated. If there's no upper limit, leave this field blank. This field supports up to 6 decimal places for precision. However, the Maintenance Reserve Cap field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Cap on Maintenance Reserve for This Assembly: Specify the maximum limit to be accumulated. If there's no upper limit, leave this field blank. This field supports up to 6 decimal places for precision. However, the Maintenance Reserve Cap field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision)
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2406_MR Cap (Precise)
